title: SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST: duration_days validation before diversifier allocation
description: SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST validates duration_days == 0 and > max_days BEFORE calling alloc_diversifier_and_create_invoice. This is the correct order: a bad input would otherwise advance the diversifier index and burn a Sapling address with no invoice created. The guard-before-allocate pattern should be preserved in any future parameter additions to this handler.
